# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:18-slim

# Install system utilities
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    curl \
    wget \
    vim \
    git

# Install build tools
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
    make \
    g++

# Clean up apt cache to reduce image size
RUN apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json
COPY package*.json ./

# Install Node.js dependencies
RUN npm install

# Copy application code
COPY . .

# Expose application port
EXPOSE 3000

# Start the application
CMD ["npm", "start"]
